name: Learning-based Probabilistic Load Forecasting with Post-hoc and In-model Uncertainty
summary: arXiv:2607.12730v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Smart-building load forecasters are often trained offline on dense, multivariate, high-frequency data, but deployment may provide only hourly, feat...
description: arXiv:2607.12730v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Smart-building load forecasters are often trained offline on dense, multivariate, high-frequency data, but deployment may provide only hourly, feature-limited inputs. Missing features must then be reconstructed, and their errors can propagate through the model. If this input uncertainty is not reflected, prediction intervals may become miscalibr...
author: Sarah Al-Shareeda, Gulcihan Ozdemir, Heung Seok Jeon
